mapper.insert: INSERT INTO packing_order ( request_date, requested_by, target_team, status, remark ) VALUES ( #{requestDate}, #{requestedBy}, #{targetTeam}, #{status}, #{remark} )

INSERT INTO packing_order_detail ( packing_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, inbound_status, packing_scan_status ) VALUES ( #{packingOrderId}, #{productType}, #{modelName}, #{color}, #{hardness}, #{baseQty}, #{boxCount}, #{eachQty}, #{totalQty}, 'WAITING', 'WAITING' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_date, requested_by, target_team, status, remark, created_at FROM packing_order ORDER BY request_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, request_date, requested_by, target_team, status, remark, created_at FROM packing_order WHERE DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY request_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') FROM packing_order WHERE request_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') DESC

SELECT id, packing_order_id, product_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(model_name, ''), product_type) AS model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, inbound_status, inbound_at, packing_scan_status, packing_scan_at FROM packing_order_detail WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, request_date, requested_by, target_team, status, remark, created_at FROM packing_order WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, request_date, requested_by, target_team, status, remark, created_at FROM packing_order WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY request_date ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE request_date = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE request_date = CURDATE() AND status IN ('READY_TO_SHIP', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE DATE_FORMAT(request_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') AND status IN ('READY_TO_SHIP', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE YEAR(request_date) = #{year} AND status IN ('READY_TO_SHIP', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'CANCELLED')
mapper.update: UPDATE packing_order_detail SET inbound_status = #{status}, inbound_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN NOW() ELSE inbound_at END WHERE id = #{detailId} AND packing_order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE status = 'REQUESTED' AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE status = 'REQUESTED' AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE status = 'REQUESTED' AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE status = 'REQUESTED' AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) = -1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order WHERE status = 'REQUESTED' AND DATEDIFF(request_date, CURDATE()) <= -2
mapper.update: UPDATE packing_order_detail SET inbound_status = 'DONE', inbound_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{detailId}
UPDATE packing_order_detail SET inbound_status = 'WAITING', inbound_at = NULL WHERE id = #{detailId}
UPDATE packing_order_detail SET packing_scan_status = 'DONE', packing_scan_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{detailId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_order_detail WHERE packing_order_id = #{orderId} AND packing_scan_status = 'DONE'

SELECT id, packing_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, inbound_status, inbound_at, packing_scan_status, packing_scan_at FROM packing_order_detail WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND inbound_status = 'DONE' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, packing_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, inbound_status, inbound_at, packing_scan_status, packing_scan_at FROM packing_order_detail WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND packing_scan_status = 'DONE' ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, request_date, requested_by, status, created_at FROM packing_order ORDER BY id DESC
